text: Here in this futuristic exhibition space, I am surrounded by an atmosphere of curiosity and reflection. The interplay between research, development, and art on the walls sparks my mind with questions about innovation and the human-machine relationship. There’s a quiet, contemplative energy here—a sense that knowledge is alive, waiting to be discovered and re-examined. I feel inspired, yet also slightly disoriented by the slanted visual perspective, as if I am glimpsing reality from a new, intriguing angle.
